title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
